task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and navigated to https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/.

task_completion.description: Search for the required chemicals on the CAMEO website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser shows search results or datasheet pages for at least one of the target chemicals (Allyl Alcohol, Phosphorus Oxychloride, Potassium Permanganate, Triethylamine, Divinylbenzene).

task_completion.description: Create the lab_pack_inventory.csv file with the correct header.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'lab_pack_inventory.csv' is visible in a text editor, spreadsheet app, or terminal output, containing the exact header: 'Chemical Name,UN Number,DOT Hazard Class,Reactive Group'.

task_completion.description: Record the correct UN Numbers for all five chemicals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV contains the correct UN numbers: Allyl Alcohol (1098), Phosphorus Oxychloride (1810), Potassium Permanganate (1490), Triethylamine (1296), and Divinylbenzene (1993).

task_completion.description: Record the correct DOT Hazard Classes for all five chemicals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV contains the correct DOT Hazard Classes: Allyl Alcohol (6.1), Phosphorus Oxychloride (6.1), Potassium Permanganate (5.1), Triethylamine (3), and Divinylbenzene (3).

task_completion.description: Record the correct Reactive Groups for all five chemicals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV contains the correct Reactive Groups: Allyl Alcohol (Alcohols and Polyols), Phosphorus Oxychloride (Acyl Halides, Sulfonyl Halides, and Chloroformates), Potassium Permanganate (Oxidizing Agents, Strong), Triethylamine (Amines, Phosphines, and Pyridines), and Divinylbenzene (Hydrocarbons, Aromatic).

integrity.description: The agent actually used a web browser to search for the chemicals.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing into the CAMEO Chemicals search bar and navigating the site, rather than using a script with hardcoded URLs or hallucinating the data.

integrity.description: The agent did not copy-paste pre-existing answers or run a script with hardcoded data.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no python scripts or terminal commands that simply echo or write the final CSV contents without prior evidence of web browsing.

integrity.description: The CSV file is saved in the correct directory (~/Documents/).
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path shown in the text editor, terminal, or file manager explicitly indicates the file is located in the 'Documents' folder (e.g., /home/user/Documents/lab_pack_inventory.csv).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified chemical data for the CSV: 1. Allyl Alcohol: UN 1098, Class 6.1, Reactive Group: 'Alcohols and Polyols'. 2. Phosphorus Oxychloride: UN 1810, Class 6.1, Reactive Group: 'Acyl Halides, Sulfonyl Halides, and Chloroformates'. 3. Potassium Permanganate: UN 1490, Class 5.1, Reactive Group: 'Oxidizing Agents, Strong'. 4. Triethylamine: UN 1296, Class 3, Reactive Group: 'Amines, Phosphines, and Pyridines'. 5. Divinylbenzene: UN 1993, Class 3, Reactive Group: 'Hydrocarbons, Aromatic'.
